idea: Call Center Page - COD Order Verification System

key_points: Created conversational dev folder structure
Made it feel like shared memory between us
High-Velocity Order Verification System for COD orders
Workflow: Draft → Call → Confirm/Cancel/Schedule/Modify
3-strike retry logic with gap time
Date-based primary (today only, no filters)
State-based queue categories
Split view layout for productivity
Manual refresh (no WebSocket)
Visual indicators over text
Mini-POS for order modification
Pending orders carry over to next day
External API pulls all draft orders (reference for all sales)
Call Center verifies each order through phone calls
3 attempts per day: morning, mid-day, evening
Confirmed orders auto-move to Confirmed tab
Can schedule for specific day or auto-next day
Can modify order during call (view/edit changes)
Full customer context: orders + services during call
After final action, order processed in system
Integration with ServiceActionsPage and customer API

decisions: Split view layout (queue left, detail right)
Manual refresh buttons per category (no WebSocket)
State-based queue categories (All, Pending, Confirmed, Scheduled, Canceled)
Confirmed orders auto-move to Confirmed tab
Scheduled orders (specific day or auto-next day)
Full customer context (orders + services) during call
Pending orders carry over to next day if not scheduled
External API for draft orders (reference for all sales)
Integration with ServiceActionsPage and customer API
questions: What should be the split view ratio? (30/70, 40/60, adjustable?)
How to prevent two agents from calling same order? (locking)
ideas: Quick add product search in mini-POS
next_steps: Design detailed UI/UX mockups (split view, tabs, actions)
Plan backend API endpoints (draft orders API, customer enrichment, actions)
Integrate with existing systems (ServiceActionsPage, customer API)

data_sources.csv_format: ERP draft orders with Arabic headers
data_sources.bosta_integration: Customer profile, service history, order history
fields: Draft Number, Customer Info, Order Details, Shipping, Postponement dates
